steps.title: Identify the researchers' focal claim
steps.content: The researchers claim children are more aware of mammals than other animals. The graph should show that mammals appear in more drawings than birds and insects.

steps.title: Match the graph data to this claim
steps.content: Mammals appear in approximately 80% of drawings, birds in approximately 68%, and insects in approximately 54%. Mammals clearly exceed both other categories, directly supporting the researchers' conclusion. The other choices either misstate the relationships or reverse them. That matches choice D — D is correct.
